name: Scalloped Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 4 Slices white bread with crusts removed -- cut into 1/4 Inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain all but 1/2 cup juice from the tomatoes.
2. Place in a 2-quart shallow casserole dish.
3. Cut the tomatoes partially through.
4. Spread and place half of the bread cubes between the wedges and around the tomatoes.
5. Melt the butter and stir in the remaining bread cubes.
6. Sprinkle sugar, salt, pepper, and buttered bread cubes over the tomatoes.
7. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes. Serves 8 to 10.
- Fresh tomatoes may be used. Increase sugar slightly.
- Can be frozen after baking.
- Goes well with roast beef.
